name: stitch-orchestrator
description: Skill-first Codex plugin for Stitch design interpretation and frontend implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Interpret Stitch designs and implement them faithfully.
interface.longDescription: A self-contained Codex plugin that bundles Stitch MCP access plus specialized skills for generating design passes, interpreting approved Stitch artifacts, implementing frontend apps, and reviewing code-to-design fidelity.
defaultPrompt: Generate a Stitch design pass for this product brief.
Interpret this approved Stitch pass before implementing the app.
Implement this Stitch design in Nuxt with high visual fidelity.
